top_signals.title: UK government split over new ‘golden visa’ scheme to woo super-rich
top_signals.summary: Anti-corruption campaigners sound the alarm after previous programme was scrapped owing to dirty money
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Turkey launches security crackdown ahead of Nato summit
top_signals.summary: Activists have been arrested, journalist accreditations denied and public assemblies banned before July meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings: Tax cut on kids’ meals and days out goes live
top_signals.summary: Tax cut on meals and days out come into force.

top_signals.title: KHI and Airbus eye cooperation on Japanese variant of Eurodrone
top_signals.summary: Kawasaki Heavy Industries has signed a preliminary deal with Airbus to cooperate on a possible Japanese anti-submarine version of a European defense drone.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 AI model cleared by U.S. for wider use
top_signals.summary: The clearance eases a confrontation that erupted two weeks ago when the government abruptly barred Anthropic from giving foreign nationals access to Mythos 5 and a related model.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
